title: Paginate Done column and other long lists
note:
The Done column shows 80+ tasks. Paginate to prevent performance issues:
- Show 10 most recent by default
- 'Show 10 more...' button at the bottom
- Count display: 'Done (80+) — showing 10'

Also apply pagination to:
- Incidents list (if > 20 items)
- Activity feed (older entries)
- Memory page (older daily logs)

title: Browser automation testing
note:
Test the OpenClaw browser tool capabilities — can it navigate sites, fill forms, extract data, handle logins? Document what works and what breaks.

Scope:
- Navigate to a website and extract page content
- Fill out a form field and submit
- Handle a login flow (if possible)
- Test JavaScript-heavy SPAs vs static pages
- Document limitations and workarounds
- Write up findings in wiki/browser-automation-findings.md

history.details: Created from Andre's request — browser automation testing was discussed but never tracked

title: Incident view pane broken
note:
The Incident detail view is broken — clicking any incident shows 
"page didn't load." This is likely a regression from the join() → 
template literal changes. 

Check:
1. Open the browser Console (Cmd+Option+I) and click an incident — 
   what error appears?
2. Check the server logs for the incidents detail route
3. Verify the incidents API endpoints still work:
   curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/api/incidents/list
4. Check if any incident-related server functions have broken paths 
   from the join() → template literal migration
5. Compare the incident detail component against a working page (like 
   Tasks detail) to see what's different

Fix whatever's broken. The incident page was working before the P1 
outage fix — something in the join() replacement broke it.

history.details: Task created

title: Bugs
note:
The P1 outage is resolved — Agent Office is rendering again. Now 
complete the remaining tasks:

═══════════════════════════════
1. CONFIRM THE FIX IS STABLE
═══════════════════════════════

- All routes return 200: /, /visual, /tasks, /scheduler, /incidents
- Console is clean — no node:fs, no node:path, no hydration errors
- Agent Office renders with canvas sprites, room ambience, crew visits
- Commit all fixes with a clear message

═══════════════════════════════
2. REMOVE ASSETS TAB
═══════════════════════════════

There's a random "Assets" tab in the sidebar. Remove it:
- Remove from sidebar navigation
- Delete the route file if it exists

═══════════════════════════════
3. PAGINATE DONE COLUMN
═══════════════════════════════

The Done column shows 80+ tasks. Paginate to prevent performance issues:
- Show 10 most recent by default
- "Show 10 more..." button at the bottom
- Count display: "Done (80+) — showing 10"

Also apply pagination to:
- Incidents list (if > 20 items)
- Activity feed (older entries)
- Memory page (older daily logs)

═══════════════════════════════
4. MAKE INCIDENTS PAGE FILTERS CLICKABLE
═══════════════════════════════

The Incidents page shows "46 tracked · 6 open · 3 critical" but 
these aren't clickable — they don't filter the list. The Tasks page 
has working filters (All, Operational, Features) that filter the 
Kanban when clicked.

Make the Incidents page filters work the same way:
- Click "6 open" → shows only open incidents
- Click "3 critical" → shows only critical/P1 incidents
- Click "46 tracked" → shows all
- Active filter should be highlighted (same style as Tasks page filters)
- The count badges should update as filters change

This makes the Incidents page consistent with the Tasks page UX.

═══════════════════════════════
5. ADD TO FRAMEWORK.MD
═══════════════════════════════

Add these gotchas:
- "setAwaitingReviewCount crash: SSR fails if a state setter is passed 
  as a prop but never defined. The page renders blank."
- "node:path static imports: replaced with lazy await import() inside 
  server function handlers. Never statically import Node.js built-ins 
  in files that could be imported by client components."
- "P1 Dashboard blank page: first check the SSR error in the HTML source 
  (view-source) before chasing client bundle issues."

═══════════════════════════════
PRIORITY
═══════════════════════════════

1. Confirm stability + commit
2. Remove Assets tab (quick cleanup)
3. Make Incidents filters clickable (UX consistency)
4. Paginate Done column (performance)
5. Update FRAMEWORK.md (institutional memory) [auto-dispatched 2026-06-04 07:06]

title: Incident Response Atmosphere
note:
Three effects only — calm operational awareness, not arcade chaos:

a) AMBIENT STATION TINT SHIFT — Wire existing AmbientStation states to incident severity: P1→critical (red), P2→alert (amber), P3/P4→busy (warm), none→calm.

b) ALERT BANNER ON DASHBOARD — Slim banner at top of Dashboard when incidents open: '⚠️ 2 open incidents — 1 P1, 1 P2' — clickable to Incidents page. Disappears when all resolved.

c) ROOM PULSE FOR ASSIGNED AGENT — When an incident has an assigned agent, that agent's room pulses subtly (gentle glow, not flashing). Pulse stops when incident resolved.
